---
title: "Earth observation with a focus in our coasts"
subtitle: "Marine ecology, remote sensing and geospatial analysis"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

Hi, I'm **Fer**. This site under construction is where I will share my projects, analysis work, and data explorations.

---

<video autoplay muted loop playsinline style="width:100%;border-radius:6px;">
  <source src="/assets/DJI_20240517093052_0003_D.mov" type="video/mp4">
</video>

---
